title: Weleda Stretch Mark Oil, Body Oil, Massage, Developed with Midwives, Vitamin A,D & E, Anti Inflammatory, Dermatologically Tested, 100% Certified Natural, Vegan, 100ml
features: Weleda Stretch Mark Massage Oil: For mums-to-be. The organic arnica flower extract helps ease tightness and provides a layer of comforting warmth with a soothing massage. Suitable for sensitive skin
Helps reduce the appearance of stretch marks: Helps to retain elasticity as skin stretches. Easy-to-apply alternative to stretch mark cream. Glides on, for comfort before, during and after pregnancy
Weleda organic ingredients: With all natural ingredients and essential oils, plus sweet almond oil and jojoba extracts. Pregnancy-friendly paraben free, free from synthetic dyes and fragrances
Your changing skincare needs in pregnancy: Developed with our team of midwives and pharmacists to help support your skin when it needs a little extra care. Dermatologically tested for sensitive skin
Part of the Weleda kids, mother and baby range: From before the birth to caring for your newborn, Weleda beauty products and sensitive skin moisturisers are specially formulated for all the family
description: Product Description Weleda Stretch Mark Oil Helps to retain elasticity as the skin stretches during pregnancy. A base of sweet almond oil delivers intensely moisturising essential fatty acids that help keep your skin supple and protected from drying. Because pregnancy is a big job for your muscles and skin, the organic arnica flower extract helps ease tightness. Nourishing wheat germ oil helps condition skin’s texture with vitamins A, D and E. Regular use helps to correct the appearance of stretch marks on your pregnant belly, thighs, bottom and breasts, and helps prevent the appearance of new ones. Part of the range of Weleda baby products and new parent skincare essentials. Pregnancy can be celebrated as one of life’s most significant moments of change. Excitement and possible uncertainties mean emotions fluctuate, while hormones are surging and the body is constantly adapting. It's not unusual for these changes to be reflected in your skin, and for it to feel super-sensitive during pregnancy. • Weleda Stretch Mark Massage Oil – 100ml • Helps to retain skin elasticity • Helps to correct the appearance of stretch marks • Ideal for sensitive skin • Richly moisturising massage therapy • Certified natural and organic ingredients • Suitable for vegans • For all skin types Ingredients Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil, Fragrance (Parfum), Arnica Montana Flower Extract, Limonene, Linalool, Citronellol, Geraniol, Citral, Eugenol, Farnesol. Directions 1. Shake the bottle well before use. 2. Apply a small amount of oil on the palm hand and heat gently. 3. Gently massage the areas affected by stretch marks, such as abdomen, buttocks breasts, in circular motions. 4. Repeat massage twice a day, preferably after bath or shower. 5. Be sure to moisturize your skin regularly to maintain elasticity reduce appearance stretch marks. See more

specifications_table.Storage Instructions: ‎Store in a cool (<25°) and dry place.
